response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering maturity, multi-disciplinary expertise, and proven leadership across diverse domains, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His C++ expertise is severely outdated (last significant work 2014-2015, over a decade ago), his career has shifted to web/TypeScript/Node.js, and he lacks any industrial automation, IoT, or industrial cybersecurity domain knowledge. The combination of stale C++ skills, complete domain pivot, and absence of IEC 62443 or SDL experience represents substantial risk for a mid-senior IC role requiring immediate technical productivity.
strengths: Extensive software architecture and design pattern expertise demonstrated across multiple senior roles and open-source projects
Proven mentoring and technical leadership capability (organized refactoring dojos, conducted workshops, led engineering teams)
Strong concurrent and distributed systems experience (asynchronous I/O, microservices, event-driven architectures at scale)
concerns: C++ expertise is severely outdated—last significant work was National Instruments in 2014-2015, with no recent C++ projects to demonstrate currency
Zero industrial automation, IoT, or embedded systems domain experience; career focused entirely on web/backend/full-stack development
No evidence of security standards knowledge (IEC 62443, SDL implementation, industrial cybersecurity) or secure development lifecycle practices
